options.command: PYTHONPATH=libs/shared-manufacturing/src uv run --no-sync --package shared-manufacturing python -m pytest libs/shared-manufacturing/tests
PYTHONPATH=apps/warehouse360/backend uv run --no-sync --package warehouse360-backend uvicorn warehouse360_backend.main:app --reload --port 8004
PYTHONPATH=. uv run --no-sync --package warehouse360-backend python -m pytest
PYTHONPATH=apps/warehouse360/backend uv run --no-sync --package warehouse360-backend ruff check apps/warehouse360/backend
tsc --noEmit --allowImportingTsExtensions --moduleResolution bundler --module ESNext --target ES2022 --jsx react-jsx src/client.ts src/query.ts src/hooks.ts
PYTHONPATH=apps/platform uv run --no-sync --package platform-backend uvicorn backend.main:app --reload --port 8006
PYTHONPATH=apps/platform uv run --no-sync --package platform-backend python -m pytest apps/platform/backend/tests
PYTHONPATH=apps/platform uv run --no-sync --package platform-backend ruff check apps/platform/backend
uv run --no-sync --package template-backend python -m compileall template_backend
PYTHONPATH=libs/shared-trace/src uv run --no-sync --package shared-trace python -m pytest libs/shared-trace/tests
PYTHONPATH=libs/shared-auth/src uv run --no-sync --package shared-auth python -m pytest libs/shared-auth/tests
PYTHONPATH=libs/shared-api/src uv run --no-sync --package shared-api python -m pytest libs/shared-api/tests
PYTHONPATH=libs/shared-ddd/src uv run --no-sync --package shared-ddd python -m pytest libs/shared-ddd/tests
PYTHONPATH=libs/shared-geo/src uv run --no-sync --package shared-geo python -m pytest libs/shared-geo/tests
PYTHONPATH=libs/shared-db/src uv run --no-sync --package shared-db python -m pytest libs/shared-db/tests
